title: elsholtzia cristata f. leucantha
intro: Elsholtzia cristata f. leucantha, also known as white glandular Vietnamese mint, is a plant species in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Elsholtzia cristata f. leucantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Elsholtzia cristata f. leucantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
